title: Unicorn Violet
description: 4 sets × 4 over-unders [3min @85%, 1min @103%, 30s peak @114%] — peak sprints added

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Enjoy the easy minutes. Your legs have no idea what's coming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Prepare your body for quality work. Every great session starts here.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive warm-up: elevate core temperature, activate neuromuscular pathways.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Smooth breathing, easy cadence. Build gradually.

coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Hold 85% FTP. Low cadence unders (65 rpm), high cadence peaks (100+ rpm)
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay smooth, absorb the effort
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The under is supposed to feel easy. Supposed to.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Settle in at 85%. Recovery is relative.

coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Push to 103% FTP!
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is where you get faster
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Welcome to the over. Population: suffering.

coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Recovery spin: partial PCr resynthesis and lactate clearance.

coachingNotes.MIXED: Bring it down smoothly. You earned this.
